examples: Menstruation may cease when a woman is anywhere between forty-five and fifty years of age.
For the first 21 days after menstruation, estrogen hormones create a feeling of well-being and give generally happy feelings.
Menstruation (a period) is a major stage of puberty in girls; it's one of the many physical signs that a girl is turning into a woman.
Anna wanted to become pregnant again but had irregular menstruation due to her eating disorder.
Conversely, menstruation is starting only marginally earlier in girls today than 40 years ago.
